title: '3/' — orphan paper-doc attachment (Sept 2024 Shanghai)
html:
TL;DR

  • Apple Note titled "3/" dated September 10, 2024 with a single attachment ref (2C49B5FD-7E7C-476D-9434-7ED5D8A7207F.com.apple.paper) — likely a scribbled note via Apple's "paper" / Notes drawing layer, not a photo.
  • The .com.apple.paper extension distinguishes this from the HEIC-attachment orphans (2024 06 16 new note, 2024 07 31 new note) — this one is a handwritten/sketched page, not a captured image.
  • Falls in Yahir's early-fall 2024 Shanghai stretch, two days before the explicit "do whatever the fuck you want" manifesto — likely a doodle or brainstorm scrap from that headspace.
  • Title "3/" reads like the third item in a series — possibly a numbered sketch sequence Yahir never completed.
  • Sketch content not recoverable from the SQLite export pipeline; lives only on-device.

Why this matters (a little)

  • Shows the third attachment-orphan subtype in the taxonomy: text-only-orphan, photo-orphan, and now drawing-orphan.
  • Temporal proximity to a known major manifesto note suggests this might have been visual scratch-work paired with that headspace — but without recovering the asset, that's pure speculation.

Connections

  • — drawing-orphan subtype
  • 2024 09 12 never forget you can do whatever the fuck you want — adjacent in time, possibly thematically related
  • shanghai study abroad · china chapter — context
  • 2024 06 16 new note · 2024 07 31 new note — sibling orphans (different attachment types)
